diagrams.title: Binary Search Recursive Call Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how the array is divided at each recursive step when searching for an element
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how binary search recursively divides the array and builds the call stack

diagrams.title: Binary Search Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Binary decision tree showing comparison outcomes at each level
elements: Leaf nodes: found or not found
diagrams.purpose: Understand the decision process and tree height representing time complexity

diagrams.title: Iterative vs Recursive Binary Search Stack Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparing memory usage between iterative and recursive approaches
elements: Recursive: Stack frames at each level (log n frames)
Iterative: Single frame with loop variables
Space for n=1000: Recursive ~10 stack frames, Iterative 1 frame
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why iterative binary search has O(1) space complexity vs O(log n) for recursive
